item.title: Filing: SPLASH BEVERAGE GROUP, INC. (SBEV) (CIK 0001553788)
item.description: This SEC filing details Splash Beverage Group, Inc.'s acquisition of exclusive global licensing rights for CannEpil®, a proprietary cannabinoid-based therapeutic for drug-resistant epilepsy, from Argent BioPharma Limited. The purpose is to leverage CannEpil's existing international commercialization and regulatory progress to build a differentiated cannabinoid therapeutics platform, pursue U.S. regulatory advancement, and ultimately drive revenue and shareholder value.
item.content:encoded:
Company Name: SPLASH BEVERAGE GROUP, INC. (SBEV) (CIK 0001553788)
Filing Type: 8-K
Filing Date: 2026-07-06
Filing Time: Unknown

AI Summary:
This SEC filing details Splash Beverage Group, Inc.'s acquisition of exclusive global licensing rights for CannEpil®, a proprietary cannabinoid-based therapeutic for drug-resistant epilepsy, from Argent BioPharma Limited. The purpose is to leverage CannEpil's existing international commercialization and regulatory progress to build a differentiated cannabinoid therapeutics platform, pursue U.S. regulatory advancement, and ultimately drive revenue and shareholder value.

Keyword Excerpts:

Drug-resistant epilepsy affects approximately 30% of epilepsy patients worldwide and remains one of the most significant unmet needs in neurology, with millions of patients continuing to experience uncontrolled seizures despite currently available therapies. “The acquisition of the exclusive global rights to CannEpil is an important step in our strategy to build a differentiated cannabinoid therapeutics platform. We believe CannEpil provides Splash with an exceptional opportunity to leverage existing international commercialization while pursuing U.S. regulatory advanc ...

item.title: Filing: CLARIVATE PLC (CLVT) (CIK 0001764046)
item.description: This SEC filing details Clarivate PLC's strategic divestiture of its LS&H segment, which aims to generate cash proceeds for debt reduction, balance sheet strengthening, and shareholder value creation. The filing also reaffirms the company's 2026 financial outlook, reclassifying the divested segment as discontinued operations and noting an expected non-cash goodwill impairment.

item.title: Filing: Versant Media Group, Inc. (VSNT) (CIK 0002067876)
item.description: Versant Media Group, Inc. (VSNT) filed this document to announce its definitive agreement to acquire Full Swing, a leading sports technology platform specializing in interactive golf, baseball, and multi-sport experiences. The acquisition aims to integrate Full Swing's interactive sports platform into Versant's portfolio, expanding its capabilities in immersive play, training, entertainment, and performance data, while building on Versant's leadership in golf and diversifying into other interactive sports experiences.
item.content:encoded:

Versant Media Group, Inc. The acquisition aims to integrate Full Swing's interactive sports platform into Versant's portfolio, expanding its capabilities in immersive play, training, entertainment, and performance data, while building on Versant's leadership in golf and diversifying into other interactive sports experiences.

item.title: Filing: NEWS CORP (NWS, NWSA, NWSLL) (CIK 0001564708)
item.description: This SEC filing, an Appendix 3C Notification, serves to announce News Corp's "2025 Repurchase Program" for its shares. Through this program, the company is authorized to repurchase up to an aggregate of US$1 billion of its Nasdaq-listed Class A and Class B common stock, from time to time in the open market or otherwise, until July 15, 2025.

Published research on magnetic materials simulation and quantum dynamics reflects the Company’s active effort to extend quantum annealing into scientific computing domains relevant to materials science, electronics, medical imaging, and physical systems modeling. “In D-Wave’s opinion, being named a Leader in the IDC MarketScape is powerful validation of our execution, commercial traction, a ...

Ocean SDK, the Company’s open-source Python toolkit, allows developers to build hybrid quantum applications using familiar programming workflows, while the Stride hybrid solver supports optimization problems involving up to 2 million variables and constraints.” The report also noted that “D-Wave’s quantum annealing roadm ...

The planned Advantage3 TM system targets a multichip 100,000-qubit architecture. item.title: Filing: ExxonMobil Holdings Corp (CIK 0002115436)
item.description: This SEC filing primarily aims to explain ExxonMobil's use of "adjusted earnings (loss)" as a non-GAAP financial measure, detailing how management internally assesses performance and manages commodity exposure to provide investors with increased transparency and a management-centric view. Additionally, it provides a Regulation FD notice regarding the company's intent to release its 2Q 2026 financial results on July 31, 2026, via its website and a Form 8-K filing.
item.content:encoded:
Company Name: ExxonMobil Holdings Corp (CIK 0002115436)
Filing Type: 8-K
Filing Date: 2026-07-07
Filing Time: Unknown Time

AI Summary:
This SEC filing primarily aims to explain ExxonMobil's use of "adjusted earnings (loss)" as a non-GAAP financial measure, detailing how management internally assesses performance and manages commodity exposure to provide investors with increased transparency and a management-centric view. Additionally, it provides a Regulation FD notice regarding the company's intent to release its 2Q 2026 financial results on July 31, 2026, via its website and a Form 8-K filing.

Keyword Excerpts:
  • ... of the business as seen through the eyes of management. Adjusted earnings (loss) is not meant to be viewed in isolation or as a substitute for net income (loss) attributable to ExxonMobil as prepared in accordance with U.S. GAAP. In accordance with Regulation FD, we are hereby providing notice the Company currently intends to furnish its 2Q 2026 financial results both (1) by posting them on our website at www.exxonmobil.com and (2) in a filing on Form 8-K in the Securities and Exchange Commission EDGAR system, each at approximately 5:30 a.m. CT Friday, July 31, 2026. In the event the EDGAR system experiences technical difficulties, or the Company is unable to successfully complete its 8-K filing at the intended time, investors and the public should look for this information at that time on our website.
